nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Hauxwell's thrush (Turdus hauxwelli) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and possibly Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found from the eastern half of Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and eastern Peru into northern Bolivia. From there its range extends into western Brazil to an arc roughly defined by northern Amazonas, west-central Pará, and northern Mato Grosso do Sul. It possibly also occurs in far southwestern Venezuela but has not been confirmed there.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | title =Birds of Venezuela | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =second | date =2003 | location =Princeton NJ | pages =714 | language =English }} The species inhabits humid forest, especially várzea and stands on river islands and riverbanks

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in terra firme forest. In elevation it reaches in Colombia, in Ecuador, but locally to in Peru, and in Brazil.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M
